## [00:00 - 03:00]

Another one of the byproducts of a mastermind that people don't even realize is the networking. See, I'm not a big networker. I've never, I haven't had a business card in probably 25 years. I just, it's not my thing. I'm not like, Hey, how you doing, Dean? Even when I wasn't successful, I'm just not, I wouldn't consider myself a networker, but I'm lying because I love to make strategic relationships that could be beneficial for both. I mean, what's better than a relationship that's a win-win, right? You have clients, they have product, you have clients and they have clients and you could cross promote each other. Somebody has experienced the problem that you're facing now and they solved it and grew. They hired the right person. What you want to share with your mastermind attendees is the power of networking to always leave their ears open to hear what people are saying, their success they had, the failures they had. You might find someone that went through a divorce and came out good on the other side or lost the weight and you're there for a money making thing and you're going to talk to somebody about fixing your relationship because they experienced it. That's the power of collective genius, collective wisdom in a room. But a lot of times, I don't know about you. I'm not the best at just saying, Hey, how's it going? Let's, let's meet and let's do this. So we created a tool, a networking tool to make the connection. And this has worked so magically. This is something you're going to want to go over at some point in the mastermind, just so they know, Hey, when someone's got something you need and you have something, or you have something they need, it can be mutual beneficial, fill out this tool. And here's the real simple process of this tool. Hey, this is, I want to make it casual. Hey, this is Dean Graziosi. My company is BBG enterprises. We help impact people's lives by giving them the success tools and tapping to their full potential and go to the next level. I think we should collaborate because you have students that need what I have and you, and my students need what you have. I think we should collaborate because you're a great marketer. I think we should collaborate because you hired under values and culture. And I want to take that to another level. I think we should, whatever it is. And then the next piece is the best result would be, is that we both raised the sales and the impact of our company without additional revenue. The best thing would be that I hire the perfect CFO and I can help you with your marketing. You make it a win-win on this sheet rather than, Hey, can I get your number on the phone? Right. And also best way to connect like me, I love text messages. I don't like phone calls. I don't even do phone calls. I don't check email as much as I used to. I like tech message. So you check that out. And then a lot of us have assistance or someone that helps us. You could put your assistance name on here. That's how simple it is. And that's how quick this tool is, but that's how powerful it can be. Networking and having the right relationships. It's the key to your next level. And that's what masterminds can do when they're treated the right way, using the right tools.
